problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Small. Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
